### 3. Content of src/types.ts

```typescript
import type { ReactNode } from 'react';
import type { TagColor } from './constants/tag_colors';

export interface ListItemData {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  icon?: ReactNode;
  accessories?: ListItemAccessoryData[];
  detail?: ListItemDetailData;
}

export interface ListItemAccessoryData {
  text?: string;
  icon?: ReactNode;
  tag?: {
    text: string;
    color?: TagColor;
  };
}

export interface ListItemDetailData {
  markdown: string;
  metadata?: ListItemMetadataEntry[];
}

export type ListItemMetadataEntry =
  | {
      type: 'label';
      title: string;
      text?: string;
    }
  | {
      type: 'link';
      title: string;
      text: string;
      target: string;
    }
  | {
      type: 'tag-list';
      title: string;
      tags: {
        text: string;
        color?: TagColor;
      }[];
    }
  | { type: 'separator' };

export interface SectionData {
  title: string;
  items: ListItemData[];
}

export interface GridItemData {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  icon?: ReactNode;
}

export interface ColorItemData extends GridItemData {
  color: string;
}
```

---

### 4. Content of src/App.tsx

The file is 660 lines. Key sections:

**Lines 1-30:** Imports (components, hooks, types, data)

**Lines 30-57:** Utility functions
- `filterSections()` - filters list sections by query
- `filterColors()` - filters color items by query
- `flattenItems()` - flattens sections to array of items
- `renderMetadataEntry()` - renders detail metadata entries

**Lines 95-146:** Type definitions and constants
- `ColorSwatch` component
- `SearchIcon` component
- `ViewMode` type ('list' | 'grid' | 'form')
- `SnippetFormState` interface
- `SNIPPET_CATEGORIES` array

**Lines 166-346:** App state management
- Query state, selection index, actions panel, drilled item
- View mode state (list/grid/form)
- Snippet form state with validation
- Toast management
- Event handlers: handleQueryChange, handleActiveIndexChange, handleDrillIn, handleDrillBack, handleOpenCreateSnippet, handleSubmitSnippet
- Keyboard shortcuts: Cmd+K (toggle actions), Cmd+Enter (submit form), Cmd+N (create snippet)

**Lines 350-437:** Dropdown actions configuration
- Open, Copy Name, Show Detail, Create Snippet, Delete actions with keyboard shortcuts

**Lines 448-659:** JSX render
- SearchBar with breadcrumbs
- Three view modes:
  - Form view (snippet creation)
  - Grid view (color picker)
  - List view (main search results)
- Detail panel (conditionally rendered)
- ActionPanel with dropdown
- ToastContainer

---

## Summary

This is a **Raycast UI clone** built with:
- **Tech Stack:** React 19, TypeScript (strict), Vite 6, Sass, Bun
- **Component Architecture:** 12 main component directories with composable, single-use components
- **Styling:** Individual .scss files per component + global design tokens
- **Features:** Search/filter, list/grid/form views, detail panels, actions dropdown, toast notifications, breadcrumb navigation, keyboard shortcuts, color tagging system

All 50+ component files follow strict naming conventions (snake_case filenames) and maintain clean separation between logic, styles, and tests.
